evidence_quotes.quote: publishers of games should be clearer about how long their games can be used.

paragraphs.text: Dear Sir, I think this initiative seems very good when it comes to upholding our rights as consumers. A further point I would recommend is that publishers of games should be clearer about how long their games can be used. More and more recently, games, which people thought they bought as a product they can retain, are being completely dismantled by the publisher. I think it would really be good if publishers had to contribute to a clear life expectancy at gaming, and to avoid the word ‘purchase’ when they really believe that the product can be rented for a certain number of years.
